rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O8, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE LELAND STANFORD, JUNIOR UNIVERSITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR, PER DISMISSAL OF THE MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: QUAIL CREEK VINEYARDS, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIA et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O8, 2007, LINE 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. COMMERCIAL CODE SECTION 3307(A)(1) GOVERNS. McCARTHY DEPOSITED THE CHECKS AS A GENERAL PARTNER AND THE BANK HAD KNOWLEDGE OF THAT FACT AND THAT McCARTHY WAS DEPOSITING THE CHECK IN HIS ACCOUNT. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER McCARTHY WAS AN AGENT OF PLAINTIFF UNDER CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 16301. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT ON THE AIDING AND ABETTING CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO INVESTMENT DEVELOPMENT COMPANY VS. SALVADOR GARZA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To First Amended Complaint And Motion To Strike Portions Of Said Pleading And Notice Of Hearing Of Demurrer/Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MARCH O8, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT SALVADOR GARZA'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint And Motion To Strike Portions Of Said Pleading And Demurrer/Motion To Strike IS OVERRULED REGARDING STANDING AND UNCERTAINTY. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION TO INCLUDE PROPERTY DESCRIPTIONS, PRICE TO BE PAID AND TIME AND MANNER OF PAYMENT. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE SECOND, THIRD, FOURTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC FACTS RELATED TO EACH CAUSE OF ACTION. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION, IMPLIED WARRANTY CLAIM DOES NOT APPLY TO A CONTRACT FOR SERVICES. DENY MOTION TO STRIKE REFERENCES TO LOBBYIST AGREEMENT. GRANT MOTION TO STRIKE REFERENCE TO SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE AND ATTORNEY'S FEES WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. =(302/PJM/AP)
